```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Design safe network retry policy with idempotency awareness.
---
Task:
Implement retries that improve resilience without duplicate side effects.
Requirements:
Define retryable errors, backoff, jitter, and max attempts.
Constraints:
Non-idempotent operations require safeguards.
Success Criteria:
Transient network errors recover with controlled retry volume.
```
